title: Spears Are Better
description: This mod adds a new effect for the spear! Whenever you charge at a mob with it, and 7 new enchants to make your spear better! SPEARS ARE BETTER!
body:
Welcome to the **Spears Are Better** Mod! This mod adds a new effect for the spear whenever you charge at a mob with it, and also adds 7 new enchantments to spice up your spear and makes it better!

**--Main Features--**

- Adds a new effect called **Heart Displacement**, where whenever you charge at a mob with the spear (any type) it gets this effect on hit, it quickly kills the mob in 10 seconds
- Adds custom particles for the **Heart Displacement** effect and the **Impale** enchant stun

**--Companionship--**

- Has 5 levels to it
- Deals more damage to a mob whenever riding a mob (horse, camel, etc.)
- Level 1 is at 5%, each level goes up 10% more damage

**--Dismounting--**

- Has 5 levels to it
- Has a chance to knock off another player off their mount
- Level 1 starts at 10% chance, goes up by 15% chance each level

**--Thunder Charge--**

- Has 3 levels to it
- Whenever you charge at a mob, it strikes them with a thunder bolt
- Each higher level increases the thundeer bolt amount

**--Pole Vault--**

- Has 3 levels to it
- Is exactly like the Lunge enchantment, but you have to look down and it launches you up 5 blocks each level

**--Skewering--**

- Has 3 levels to it
- Attacks through multiple mobs at once
- Starts at 3 mobs at level 1, increases by two with each higher level
- Damage increases by each level, starts at 50% and goes up 10% each higher level

**--Extended--**

- Has only 1 level to it
- Increases block and entity reach by 1.5

**--Impale--**

- Has 5 levels to it
- Has a 20% to stun a mob for 1.5 seconds at level 1
- Increases by 15% to stun and 0.5 seconds by each higher level
- Has a custom stun particle effect

This mod also supports the enchanting table having these enchants and villagers too.

**Made by MaceMeta**
